# Command

Run an explicit command as an escape hatch.

## Summary

- kind: `Command`
- visibility: `advanced`
- schema: `../../../schemas/tools/command.schema.json`
- category: `advanced`

## When To Use

Use this only when no typed step expresses the change clearly enough.

## Minimal Example

```yaml
apiVersion: deck/v1alpha1
id: example-command
kind: Command
spec:
    command:
        - example
```

## Realistic Example

```yaml
kind: Command
spec:
  command: ["systemctl", "status", "containerd"]
  timeout: 30s
```
